title: Geometry Dash Lite
description: A rhythm-based platformer where you jump and fly your way through danger!
expert_tips: Focus on the music rhythm rather than just visual cues. Practice in 'Practice Mode' to place checkpoints before difficult sections.
secrets: The Vault: Collect 10 User Coins to unlock the first secret vault.
Hidden Achievements: Try jumping 50,000 times to unlock a secret icon.

title: Slope
description: An endless 3D racing game where you roll a ball down a treacherous slope.
expert_tips: Stay in the middle of the platform as much as possible. Small, quick adjustments are better than long, sweeping turns.
secrets: Speed Boost: Hug the very edge of blue tunnels to maintain maximum velocity without hitting red obstacles.
Hidden Path: Occasionally, falling off a ledge correctly can lead to a wider lower platform.

title: Subway Surfers
description: Run as far as you can through the subway system!
expert_tips: Always prioritize the 'Magnet' and 'Jetpack' power-ups. Double-tap to use your Hoverboard when things get crowded to get a second chance.
secrets: Coin Buff: Upgrading the Multiplier in the shop is the fastest way to hit high scores.
Jump Glitch: You can jump mid-air immediately after rolling under a barrier.

title: Red Face Horror
description: A chilling horror experience where you must escape the terrifying Red Face.
expert_tips: Listen for audio cues; the monster's breathing gets louder as it approaches. Use your flashlight sparingly to conserve battery.
secrets: Secret Ending: Finding all 5 hidden notes in the basement reveals the true identity of the Red Face.
Silent Movement: Crouching completely eliminates footstep noise.

title: Escape Road 3
description: The third installment of the high-speed city escape game.
expert_tips: Drift through sharp corners to maintain your speed. Watch out for the police helicopters that appear after level 10.
secrets: Nitro Unlock: Drifting for more than 3 seconds continuously grants a short nitro boost.
Shortcut: Look for the open alleyway near the blue skyscraper for a major time save.

title: Basketball Stars
description: Show off your skills on the court and become a basketball legend.
expert_tips: Time your jumps to block opponent shots. Pumping before a real shot can trick the AI into jumping early.
secrets: Super Dunk: Reaching a 3-shot streak activates the 'On Fire' mode, making every shot 100% accurate.
Unlock Legends: Defeating the tournament on Hard mode unlocks secret legendary players.

title: BitLife
description: How will you live your BitLife? Make the right choices!
expert_tips: Study hard every year to get a high-paying job. Keep your health and happiness above 90% by going to the gym and meditating.
secrets: Lotto Win: Buying 10 lottery tickets at once significantly increases your odds of the jackpot.
Becoming a Royal: Born in a country with a monarchy? Keep restarting until you're born into the Royal Family.

title: Idols Of Ash
description: A first-person horror-descent game where you descend through a massive, decaying structure.
expert_tips: Keep an eye on your surroundings and listen for the sounds of the Murderpede.
secrets: Hidden Area: Find the hidden vents to bypass certain dangerous areas.
Easter Egg: Look for strange symbols carved into the decaying walls.
